final_reasoning: The image shows a wide road with right-hand traffic. The vegetation consists of Mediterranean-style trees and shrubs. The architecture features white-washed walls, which are very common in Southern Europe and North Africa. A billboard is visible in the distance with the word 'STAR'. The road markings and street furniture (lamp posts) are consistent with European standards. The overall lighting and arid landscape suggest a Mediterranean climate. Based on the specific combination of white walls, road layout, and vegetation, this is located in Cyprus. Specifically, the road layout and surrounding environment match areas in Nicosia.
